summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 'Gasoil fourni' feature for chantiers. All 7 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed (100%). The feature allows users to specify whether gasoil is provided by the company, which determines which kilometric rate scale will be used for billing.
passed_tests: Backend: Create chantier with avec_gasoil=true - correctly saved and persisted
Backend: Create chantier with avec_gasoil=false - correctly saved and persisted
Backend: Create chantier without avec_gasoil - defaults to true
Backend: Update chantier from avec_gasoil=true to false - correctly updated
Backend: Update chantier from avec_gasoil=false to true - correctly updated
Backend: List chantiers includes avec_gasoil field with correct values
Backend: Chantier recap endpoint includes avec_gasoil info
Frontend: Checkbox 'Gasoil fourni par l'entreprise' visible in form
Frontend: Checkbox can be unchecked to set avec_gasoil=false
Frontend: Description text changes based on checkbox state ('avec gasoil' vs 'sans gasoil')
Frontend: List displays 'Gasoil fourni' in green for avec_gasoil=true
Frontend: List displays 'Sans gasoil' in orange for avec_gasoil=false
Frontend: Edit form pre-fills checkbox correctly for 'sans gasoil' chantier (unchecked)
Frontend: Edit form pre-fills checkbox correctly for 'gasoil fourni' chantier (checked)
Frontend: Detail view shows 'Non fourni' badge in orange for sans gasoil
Frontend: Detail view shows 'Fourni' badge in green for avec gasoil
seed_data_creation: Test chantier 'TEST-GASOIL-EA9AFA' was created and deleted during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: The 'Gasoil fourni' feature is fully implemented and tested. The avec_gasoil field in chantiers determines which kilometric rate scale (barème) will be used for billing - 'avec gasoil' or 'sans gasoil'. The checkbox in the form defaults to checked (true). The list and detail views display the gasoil status with appropriate colors (green for 'Gasoil fourni', orange for 'Sans gasoil').
